problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
mechanism: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering
hypothesis: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering may resolve What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
